# @architecture/validate-slice-readiness

Validates slice readiness manifests in docs/slices/ against ADR-0024 readiness tier model.

## Package identity

## Responsibilities

- Validate docs/slices/*.json against known capabilities and tier rules
- Enforce blocker resolution before marking slices Done

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not implement slice features
- Does not manage Terraform
